page: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-60-lssd is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the x86_64 AMD EPYC 9B14 processor. This server features 60 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 30 physical cores with multithreading enabled. The hardware configuration includes 480 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. Storage is bundled directly with the instance, providing 1608 GB of local NVMe SSD capacity distributed across four local drives.

In benchmark evaluations, this instance demonstrates strong multi-core processing capabilities, placing in the top 25% for stress-ng multi-core CPU performance, Geekbench multi-core, and Passmark CPU scores. The AMD EPYC architecture supports advanced instructions including AVX-512 vector extensions and cryptographic acceleration, which contribute to strong performance in Passmark encryption and extended instruction tests. Memory performance is mixed; while small-block cached read-only memory bandwidth is strong, large-block uncached read and write bandwidth operations fall into the average tier.

The combination of high memory density and local NVMe SSD storage makes this instance highly suitable for memory-intensive databases, large-scale Redis deployments, and data processing pipelines. Redis SET operations and Passmark database benchmarks both rank in the top 25% of tested systems. However, workloads requiring high-throughput large-block memory access or GPU acceleration may encounter limitations, as this instance lacks a dedicated GPU and exhibits average uncached memory write speeds.
description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-60-lssd is an x86_64 memory-optimized server powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor. It features 60 dedicated vCPUs, 480 GB of RAM, and 1608 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. The instance delivers strong multi-core CPU performance, ranking in the top 25% on stress-ng and Geekbench multi-core benchmarks. It also supports advanced instruction sets like AVX-512, which accelerate cryptographic and vector operations. While small-block cached memory bandwidth is strong, uncached large-block memory read and write speeds remain average. This resource profile, combined with strong database and Redis performance, makes the instance well-suited for memory-intensive databases, caching layers, and data-processing workloads that benefit from high memory density and fast local storage, though it lacks GPU acceleration.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-60-lssd is an x86_64 memory-optimized server featuring 60 vCPUs, 480 GB RAM, and 1608 GB of local NVMe SSD storage powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor.

tagline: A memory-dense x86_64 server featuring 60 vCPUs, 480 GB RAM, and local NVMe SSDs for demanding database and caching workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by AMD EPYC 9B14 CPU with 60 dedicated vCPUs and 30 physical cores
Equipped with 480 GB RAM, providing 8.0 GB of memory per vCPU
Includes 1608 GB of local NVMe SSD storage across four drives
Strong multi-core CPU, database, and Redis SET performance
Supports AVX-512 and cryptographic hardware acceleration
Optimized for memory-intensive databases and high-throughput caching layers
